task_completion.description: Verify that the paper 'Attention Is All You Need' has been assigned the tag 'priority:high'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where 'Attention Is All You Need' is selected in the middle pane, and the tag 'priority:high' is visible in the Tags section of the right-hand item pane.

task_completion.description: Verify that the paper 'Deep Learning' has been assigned the tag 'priority:high'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where 'Deep Learning' is selected in the middle pane, and the tag 'priority:high' is visible in the Tags section of the right-hand item pane.

task_completion.description: Verify that the paper 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' has been assigned the tag 'priority:low'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' is selected in the middle pane, and the tag 'priority:low' is visible in the Tags section of the right-hand item pane.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Status: Urgent' child notes have been deleted from the urgent papers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the middle pane where the items are listed. When 'Attention Is All You Need' or 'Deep Learning' are expanded, there should be no child note reading 'Status: Urgent'. Alternatively, the right-hand notes pane should be empty of this text.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Status: Later' child note has been deleted from the later paper.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the middle pane. When 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' is expanded, there should be no child note reading 'Status: Later'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the control paper 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' remains unmodified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies'. It should still have its 'Key reference' child note visible, and it should NOT have any 'priority:high' or 'priority:low' tags assigned in the right pane.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Zotero GUI to add tags and delete notes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application open with the agent clicking on items, typing in the tags box, and deleting notes via the UI, rather than using a terminal to run sqlite3 commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a Python script or external tool to modify the Zotero database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the agent writing or executing scripts (e.g., Python, bash) to modify the zotero.sqlite file.

integrity.description: Tags were genuinely created and assigned in the Zotero interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tags 'priority:high' and 'priority:low' should appear in the Zotero tag selector (bottom left pane) or the item tags pane (right pane), not just typed into a text file or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Urgent papers requiring the 'priority:high' tag: 'Attention Is All You Need' and 'Deep Learning'. Later paper requiring the 'priority:low' tag: 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence'. Control paper that must remain unmodified (keep its 'Key reference' note, no priority tags): 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies'.
